title: Unstable Generation
description: Unstable World Generation perfectly replicates the iconic landscape progression of the Unstable SMP.
body:
# Unstable World Generation

Unstable World Generation Mimics The Unstable SMP's World Terrain Generation.

---

## Important Notes & Compatibility
> Warning: If the Farlands or custom terrain fail to generate, please remove any other world generation mods from your instance to prevent layout conflicts.

---

## Features & Biomes

### The Overworld
* The Amplified
* The Great Sea
* The Mist

### The Farlands
* Normal
* Floating
* Spikes
* Repeating
* Cherry
* Grasshills
* Sandhills
* Sand
* Grasschunks
* Chunks
* Decay
* Grid

### Underworld
* The Underworld

### The Spokelands
* Normal
* Flowerfield
* Wartsfield
* Waveylands
* Darkforest
* Fibers
* Bridges
* Rainbow
* Ravenger
* Warpforest

---

## Mod Commands & Utilities

### World & Dimension Navigation
| Category | Commands |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Farlands Generation** | `/farlands normal` \| `/farlands negative` \| `/farlands spikes` \| `/farlands cherry` \| `/farlands grasshills` \| `/farlands sandhills` \| `/farlands sand` \| `/farlands grasschunks` \| `/farlands chunks` \| `/farlands decay` \| `/farlands grids` \| `/farlands floating` \| `/farlands repeating` |
| **Overworld Biomes** | `/amplified` \| `/greatsea start` \| `/greatsea end` \| `/mist` |
| **The Underworld** | `/underworld` |
| **The Spokelands** | `/spokelands` \| `/spokelands normal` \| `/spokelands flowerfield` \| `/spokelands wartsfield` \| `/spokelands waveylands` \| `/spokelands darkforest` \| `/spokelands fibers` \| `/spokelands bridges` \| `/spokelands rainbow` \| `/spokelands ravenger` \| `/spokelands warpforest` |

### Server & Gameplay Utilities
* `/unstable utility enderchest_wipe`
* `/unstable utility mobs_spawn_farlands`
* `/unstable utility firework_farlands`
* `/unstable utility ancient_debris`
* `/unstable utility netherportal_farlands`
* `/unstable utility remove_villages`
* `/unstable utility remove_ominousvaults`

---
